h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: "could change in another row" helps separate the row value from the header
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue applying the header/field vs. cell-value distinction mechanically while repeatedly noting residual confusion about the header 'standing for' the row's value.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Use-test before resubmitting: in `Chicago | 82 | March`, `rainfall_mm` is used to locate the rainfall slot; `82` is copied from the row as the rainfall value.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adds a 'use-test' framing in T2 but does not show stock-taking contrast acknowledging the old route has failed, and the new device remains within the same representational route (the same row example, same slot/value vocabulary), so neither part A nor part B of the reversal criterion is fully met.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no later tutor uptake to a revised learner frame.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no later tutor uptake to a revised learner frame.
